scripts.link-check: { find docs -name '*.md' | xargs -n1 env FORCE_COLOR=1 markdown-link-check --config .markdown-link-check.json; FORCE_COLOR=1 markdown-link-check --config .markdown-link-check.json index.md ACCESSIBILITY.md FRONT-MATTER.md STYLES.md CONTRIBUTING.md WORKFLOW.md README.md; } | tee /tmp/link-check-out.txt; echo ''; echo '=== BROKEN LINKS SUMMARY ==='; grep -E '✖|ERROR' /tmp/link-check-out.txt || echo 'No broken links found.'; echo ''; echo 'Key: [✓] checked and alive  [/] skipped (ignored pattern)  [✖] dead link'
